feature: Audit Pipeline Correctness — TestsExist Escalation + completed_steps Wiring
description: Three bugs caused incorrect audit reports and pipeline stalls: (1) TestsExist never escalated to hex-fixer after repeated tester failures — consumed all max_iterations; (2) Supervisor never wrote completed_steps to the shared session — the TUI sync-back always saw an empty vec and fell through to a permissive fallback; (3) The completed_steps fallback was unconditional — marked all workplan steps done even on pipeline error/halt.

tasks.name: Split (TestsExist, _) into (false) => hex-tester / (true) => hex-fixer
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/pipeline/objectives.rs, change line 195 from `(TestsExist, _) => "hex-tester"` to two arms: `(TestsExist, false) => "hex-tester"` and `(TestsExist, true) => "hex-fixer"`. This mirrors the existing escalation pattern for TestsPass and ReviewPasses. When TestsExist fails after the first tester attempt (has_prior=true), the fixer can correct test file placement or test structure rather than calling the tester in a loop until max_iterations.

phases.name: Write completed_steps to shared session when a tier passes

tasks.name: Push tier step IDs into session.completed_steps on AllPassed in supervisor::run()
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/pipeline/supervisor.rs, after `let halted = matches!(&result, TierResult::Halted { .. });`, add a block: if passed, lock self.session, push each step.id in `steps` that is not already in session.completed_steps, then call session.save(). This ensures the TUI sync-back at tui/mod.rs:1103 receives real step data from the shared Mutex instead of an empty vec. Without this, completed_steps was always empty after supervisor.run() and the fallback at line 1108 fired unconditionally.

tasks.name: Add result.is_ok() guard to completed_steps fallback in tui/mod.rs
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/tui/mod.rs line 1108, change `if self.session.completed_steps.is_empty()` to `if self.session.completed_steps.is_empty() && result.is_ok()`. When supervisor.run() returns Err (pipeline halted or errored), completed_steps must remain empty — marking all steps done on failure was producing misleading audit reports where `hex dev status` showed all steps completed even after a pipeline halt.

tasks.name: Full build verification and commit
tasks.description: Run `cargo build -p hex-cli` (full dev build, not check-only) to verify no regressions across all three files. All three changes are in pipeline-internal code paths with no public API changes. Commit with message describing all three root causes and their fixes.
